Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

(13 comments)

I give -1 because I am a bit confused and concerned after I read through the entire document. It doesn't seem consistent with the original principle of "K8S Plugin" as the scope.

If I understand correctly, the flow will look like:

(1) north bound components generate a TOSCA template targeted for K8S.

(2) SO calls MultiVIM Proxy API and passes the entire TOSCA BP (in CSAR) to MultiVIM

(2.1) The Proxy API looks like:
http://msb.onap.org:80/api/multicloud/v0/kubernetes/<cloud-id>/<tenant-id>

(3) MultiVIM Proxy API then passes through the entire TOSCA BP (CSAR) to K8S Plugin.

(4) K8S Plugin handles the CSAR accordingly, and interacts with K8S cluster to deploy the containerized VNF.

Under this circumstance:
- K8S itself (including its configuration file) is out of scope of ONAP. Users can use whatever method to create the cluster and configure it accordingly.
- Registering K8S should be done in a way that is consistent with how other VIM registers. Currently, through ESR
- Thus all those irrelevant APIs, registering K8S, K8S configuration etc. are out of scope of ONAP.
- Then focus on how CSAR will be hanlded internally within K8S Plugin.

Thank you.

Patch Set 14:

Thanks for bring up your whole picture in the spec. As the team discussed on the project meeting, please focus to provide POC scope with some use case

Patch Set 14:

Hi Xinhui,
 
Thanks for reaching out.
I think this is a reasonable approach to consider a POC. That will enable the team to validate the requirements, learn on the design and code architecture.
As we have M4 in 3 weeks, we have to be realistic and realize it will be challenging to meet the Platform Maturity requirements.
I would recommend not creating repo now and scope the work for Casablanca or Dublin releases.
 
Hope this helps.
 
Thanks,
Gildas
ONAP Release Manager
1 415 238 6287

Subject: [onap-discuss] [multicloud] Multi VIM/Cloud weekly meeting
 
Hi All,
 
Thanks for your participation today. Please refer to this link for the record.
 
Considering the coming change of Daylight saving time in the weekend, we may need to move the calendar one hour ahead to keep the 5:00 PM PST every Monday polled by the team, e.g. China region members will need to dail in at 8:00 AM. A gentle reminder here and let me know if you have any thoughts.
 
Thanks for Isaku, Matti and Bin yang to share with the team today. More todos come below:
1 Isaku to add sections about POC scope for VNF Containerization by vFW/DNS or other use cases and sync with Xinhui quickly
2 Bin Yang to clarify requirements of pike support with Roberto of Orange
3 Flavor assignments is a new requirement after function freeze and needs more discussion here. Bin Yang will share the ways of attributes assignment like VM size and HPA with Matti and Ramki
 
@all module contributors and plugin owners,
Please enable Sonar python as soon as possible.  Here I put the current statistics below for more attention of the team:
cid:image001.png@01D3B541.95F6AF70
 
 
Xinhui Li
PTL of Multi VIM/Cloud

Hi All,
 
Welcome to join Multi VIM/Cloud weekly meeting. Based on the latest progress, I put together the following draft agenda as follows:
 
1 POC planning for VNF containerization (Isaku)
2 OOF assigned flavor (Matti)
3 Pike plugin support (Bin Yang)
 
Looking forward to your participation
 
Thanks,
 
Xinhui Li
PTL of Multi VIM/Cloud

Patch Set 14:

Hello Xinhui.

So far I've tried to provide the scope of PoC with this spec.
Probably I don't understand what you mean by your "POC scope with some use case" or what you'd like to know.

Can you please provide any example/sample of the "scope"?
Or can you please review on the spec concretely? or can you provide what you'd like to know?
